hooks.command: cd /home/flow/calendar-main && git pull --rebase origin main 2>&1 | tail -3

SessionStart.description: Pull latest vault changes before session

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='docs/vault/12-session-resume/';try{const f=fs.readdirSync(p).filter(x=>x.endsWith('.md')).sort().pop();if(f)console.log(fs.readFileSync(p+f,'utf8'));else console.log('No previous session')}catch(e){console.log('No previous session')}"

hooks.prompt: Write a session resume to docs/vault/12-session-resume/ with today's date as filename (YYYY-MM-DD-session.md). Include: what was accomplished, current workflow step (read from docs/vault/10-sync/workflow-state.md), what's next, vault files updated, and a one-line resume instruction. Also append a cost entry to docs/vault/11-cost-tracking/cost-log.md with estimated token usage.

Stop.description: Auto-write session resume and cost log on exit
